summary: The diff modifies frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx to update the 7 service category cards with the exact sub-service lists specified in REQ-66. The file summary explicitly confirms all 7 updated cards with the correct item counts (FSSAI License with 5 items, Trademark Registration with 7, Pollution Control Board with 10, Tender Services with 10, Digital Signature Certificate with 5, Agreement & Contract with 7, Small Business Support Service with 7). The other modified files (urlParams.ts, frontend-file-summaries.txt, project_state.json) are supporting/metadata files and do not represent hallucinated features.
